title: Amazon Promotes Malphas to Senior Vice President of Bad Decisions, Unveils 17th Leadership Principle
summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) today announced the promotion of Malphas to Senior Vice President of Bad Decisions, effective immediately. In this expanded role, Malphas will oversee the company’s strategic initiatives in byzantine pricing models, confusing product nomenclature, and Generative AI.
